chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 95 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.1067/2017 06.04.2026 Mr. Umer Akhund, advocate for the applicant Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for respondent It is jointly stated that the impugned judgment is without due discussion, deliberation and / or reasoning, therefore, the impugned judgment may be set aside and the matter may be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. It is further sought that pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the applicant arising here from. The reference application stands disposed of in the terms as aforesaid. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
